name: correctness-contract
purpose: Create and enforce the pre-write behavioral contract for non-trivial work.
rules: No non-trivial work without a contract.
Tie verification back to each contract field.
warnings: Unverified wiring makes a contract incomplete.
blockers: Wiring claim is false or unprovable.
examples: State that the manifest must register every workflow and hook path that exists.
degrades_to: Manual correctness checklist in markdown or JSON.
authority_boundary: May state and validate behavioral obligations. It may not waive them for convenience.
